rows.title: 1 in. SDS Rotary Hammer Kit
rows.description: Complete challenging applications with the 1 in. SDS Rotary Hammer. Featuring a durable German-engineered mechanism and SHOCKS ACTIVE VIBRATION technology, this tool delivers 2.8 Joules of impact energy for fast efficient drilling. For user convenience, this product is packaged with a kit box.
features: 2.8 joules of impact energy for fast drilling and chipping speed
8.0A high performance motor
Shocks - Active Vibration Control reduces vibration felt by the user at the handles. A Perform and Protect feature
additional_features: Rotating brush ring delivers full speed/torque in forward and reverse
Integral clutch reduces sudden, high torque reactions if bit jams
2 Year Free Service
Compatible with D25301D drilling dust extraction system

rows.title: 1-1/8 in. SDS Plus Rotary Hammer Kit
rows.description: Complete large diameter hole drilling in the hardest concrete with the lightweight, low vibration 1-1/8 in. SDS Plus Rotary Hammer. Featuring a durable German-engineered hammering mechanism, this tool delivers 3.5 joules of impact energy. Built with safety in mind, the SHOCKS ACTIVE VIBRATION CONTROL helps reduce vibration felt at the handles. When paired with the DWH304DH Onboard Dust Extractor, this product delivers OSHA Table 1 Compliance. Get convenient jobsite portability with the accompanying kit box.
features: 3.5 joules of impact energy for fast drilling
Wide optimal drilling range between 3/16 in. and 7/8 in. for a single-hammer solution
Durable German-engineered hammer mechanism
additional_features: Shocks Active Vibration Control technology reduces vibration felt at the handles for less user fatigue and greater productivity
OSHA Table 1 Compliant dust extraction compatible
Factory-set clutch reduces sudden, high-torque reactions if bit jams
Optimized ergonomic design provides excellent control in all orientations
Variable speed trigger for accurate hole starting

rows.title: 1-1/8 in. SDS Plus Rotary Hammer Kit with Onboard Dust Extractor
rows.description: Complete challenging conrete jobs with the 1-1/8 in. SDS Plus Rotary Hammer. Engineered with a German-engineered hammering mechanism, this Rotary Hammer delivers 3.5 Joules of impact energy for large diameter sleeve, stud/wedge, and screw anchor applications. Built with safety in mind, the SHOCKS ACTIVE VIBRATION CONTROL system helps reduce vibration felt at the handles for the user. Featuring an onboard dust extractor for efficient dust collection, this kit includes a durable kit box for convenient portability on the jobsite.
features: Wide optimal drilling range between 3/16 in. and 7/8 in. for a single-hammer solution
Durable German-engineered hammer mechanism
Shocks Active Vibration Control technology reduces vibration felt at the handles for less user fatigue and greater productivity
additional_features: Factory-set clutch reduces sudden, high-torque reactions if bit jams
Optimized ergonomic design provides excellent control in all orientations
Variable speed trigger for accurate hole starting
Powerful fan assembly for maximum suction and efficient dust collection
Class-leading dust extractor for drilling up to 1 in. diameter and to depths up to 8 in
Designed for installing large diameter sleeve, stud/wedge, and screw anchors with the Onboard Dust Extractor

rows.title: 1-1/8 in. SDS PLUS Combination Hammer Kit
rows.description: Complete large-diameter hole drilling with the 1-1/8 in. SDS PLUS Combination Hammer that delivers 4.2 Joules of impact energy. Built with safety in mind, this tool has the SHOCKS ACTIVE VIBRATION CONTROL System and the Anti-Rotation E-CLUTCH System. For user convenience, this product is packaged with a durable kit box for jobsite portability.
features: E-CLUTCH anti-rotational technology provides the next level of control for users during bind up situations
Shocks - active vibration control reduces vibration felt by the user at the handles. a perform and protect feature
3-mode selector allows for easy switching between hammer drilling, rotary only, and chipping only
additional_features: 9.0 amp motor provides high performance and overload protection
4.2 joules Impact energy delivers hard hitting power for fast drilling and chipping applications
Variable speed trigger provides full control of bit speed for a variety of applications
Forward/Reverse switch allows user to back out the bit in a bind up situation and helps in removal of fasteners
Compatible with DWH050K drilling dust extraction system

rows.title: 1-9/16 in. (40mm) SDS MAX Combination Hammer Kit
rows.description: Complete tough concrete applications with the 1-9/16 in. (40mm) SDS MAX Combination Hammer. Featuring a hard-hitting German-engineered mechanism and a lightweight design, this hammer delivers 6 Joules of impact energy. SHOCK ACTIVE VIBRATION CONTROL technology helps to limit fatigue and promote productivity. For user convenience, this product comes packaged with a durable kit box for portability on the jobsite.
features: 6.1J's of impact energy provides the power to drill fast in the hardest of concrete
Shocks - Active Vibration Control reduces vibration felt by the user at the handles. A Perform and Protect feature

rows.title: 1-9/16" Spline Combination Hammer Kit
rows.description: The D25553K 1-9/16" Spline Combination Hammer, with its durable and hard hitting German engineered mechanism, delivers 8 joules of impact energy. The lightest weight hammer in the DEWALT Spline family gives it an ergonomic and compact design. The D25553K is ideally suited for serial drilling of rebar, coring for through-hole for mechanical and electrical applications and chipping in any mid to upper wall and ceiling application.
features: 12 amp motor provides high performance and overload protection - 490 rpm, 3300 bpm

rows.title: 1-3/4 in. SDS MAX Combination Hammer
rows.description: Take on challenging concrete applications with the 1-3/4 in. SDS MAX Combination Hammer that delivers up to 8 joules of impact energy. Featuring constant speed electronics to help the tool maintain speed under load and the anti-rotation E-CLUTCH System that detects the motion of the tool and shuts it down in bind up situations. Designed lightweight for horizontal serial drilling, coring and chipping in mid to upper wall applications. Equipped with SHOCKS ACTIVE VIBRATION CONTROL, this tool helps maximize productivity on tough jobs.
features: E-CLUTCH helps protect user from violent rotations in a bind up

rows.title: 1-3/4 IN. SDS Max Combination Rotary Hammer Kit
rows.description: Take on challenging concrete applications with the 1-3/4 in. SDS MAX Combination Rotary Hammer that delivers up to 10.5 Joules of impact energy. Featuring durable German-engineered mechanisms and constant speed electronics that allow the tool to maintain speed under load, this midweight tool is ideal for suited for high-performance, horizontal serial drilling for #5 - #8 rebar, dry coring up to 4 in., chipping in any upper to lower wall and bushing applications. As a Tag Ready product, you can seamlessly track, manage and control the 1-3/4 in. SDS MAX Combination Rotary Hammer in the TOOL CONNECT system. For user convenience, this product is packaged with a kit box for jobsite portability.
features: 10.5 Joules of impact energy for fast drilling and chipping, even in the hardest concrete
E-CLUTCH system protects the user in bind-up situations by stopping the rotation of the bit
The Shocks Active Vibration Control system reduces vibration felt by the user at the handles, compared to rotary hammers without this feature
additional_features: 7-position, variable-speed control for precision hole placement, chipping, and drilling with Atomic Undercut bits
Constant-speed electronics allow the tool to maintain speed under load
Tag Ready so users and companies can attach the DEWALT Tag and track its location virtually anywhere via the Tool Connect app
The midweight design makes it ideally suited for high-performance, horizontal serial drilling for #5 - #8 rebar, dry coring up to 4 in., chipping in any upper to lower wall, and bushing applications
applications: Drilling anchor and through-holes in concrete and masonry (5/8 in. - 1-1/4 in. recommended diameter range )
Coring in masonry and concrete with core bits up to 4 in.diameter

rows.title: 1-3/4 in. Spline Combination Hammer
rows.description: Complete horizontal serial drilling for #5 - #8 rebar, coring, and chipping applications with this 1-3/4 in. Spline Combination Hammer that delivers 8 Joules of impact energy. Featuring constant-speed electronics to maintain speed under load and the E-CLUTCH System, this high-performance, lightweight hammer is ideal for tough jobs.
features: E-CLUTCH protects user from violent rotations when binding up on rebar

rows.title: 1-7/8 in. SDS MAX Combination Hammer Kit
rows.description: Complete challenging applications with the 1-7/8 in. SDS MAX Combination Hammer. Built with safety in mind, this tool features SHOCKS ACTIVE VIBRATION CONTROL and E-CLUTCH system. For user convenience, this professional product is packaged with a durable kit box for jobsite portability.
features: 2 Stage Clutch and E-CLUTCH provides both a mechanical and electronic clutch protection for maximum torque control in a bit jam situation
Compatible with DWH053K chiseling dust extraction system
Shocks - active vibration control reduces vibration felt by the user at the handles. a perform and protect feature
additional_features: 11 joules of impact energy provides fast drilling and chipping performance
Electronic variable speed gives the user full control of speed while drilling or chipping
Rear side handle mount delivers a better ergonomic position to the user when drilling downward
Electronic Soft Start provides the user more control when the trigger is pulled
Compatible with DWH050K drilling dust extraction system
Chipping function allows for fast demolition of walls and correction work on floors
Trigger lock on reduces user fatigue while chipping

rows.title: 1-7/8 in. SDS MAX Rotary Hammer
rows.description: Complete tough concrete applications with the 1-7/8 in. SDS MAX Combination Hammer. With a high-output, German-engineered mechanism, constant-speed electronics, and a brushless motor, this midweight hammer delivers 13.3 Joules of impact energy. Featuring the Anti-Rotation E-CLUTCH System and SHOCKS ACTIVE VIBRATION CONTROL, this hammer is built with safety in mind. Ideally suited for horizontal and downward drilling for #5 - #9 rebar applications, core drilling up to 5 in., and chipping in any mid-to-lower wall and floor applications, this tool is Tag Ready for seamless integration to the TOOL CONNECT inventory management system. For user convenience, this product is packaged with a durable kit box for portability on the jobsite.
features: In addition to the integral clutch, the DEWALT anti-rotation E-CLUTCH system, offers technology capable of detecting the motion of the tool. This feature senses the motion of the tool and shuts it down if necessary. The red indicator led illuminates when the E-CLUTCH System is engaged
Protects user from the effects of vibration, including numbness and tingling in the hands, allowing them to get work done more quickly without fatigue
Tool maintains speed under heavy loads, including in higher PSI concrete, allowing the user to get the job done faster
additional_features: Offers users more control by adjusting speed of drilling or chipping based upon the thickness and density of the material they are working with
Gives users the ability to drill and demolish concrete in one tool, saving them money by not needing to buy and maintain 2 tools
Connect the tool to the DEWALT Tool Connect app for tracking and inventory management
Service brush light near the handle notifies the user when it's time to take the tool in for service
includes: (1) D25733 1-7/8 in. SDS MAX Combination Hammer
applications: End-users drill into concrete wall or floor slab to install #5- # 9 rebar with adhesive anchors, to add concrete extensions to the wall or floor.

To install a mechanical anchor, a hole must be drilled first. Mechanical anchors are used to secure other materials to concrete. A typical anchors for this type of tool include our Atomic+ Undercut, large diameter Power-Stud+, large diameter Power-Bolt+ or large diameter Screw-Bolt+
Commercial electrical, mechanical and plumbing contractors will drill holes thru concrete walls with a coring bit to feed pipes and other utilities into other areas of the building.
Companies that do both drilling and demolition will use these combination hammers to chip away over-poured concrete once forms are taken off.
Commercial Demolition, Masonry and Concrete contractors will use this tool to demo concrete and masonry wall and floor structures.

rows.title: 2" SDS Max Combination Hammer
rows.description: The D25763K 2" SDS Max Combination Hammer features the 2 Stage Clutch to give the professional optimal control during bind up situations. Reduce vibration and fatigue with Active Vibration Control for comfort and endurance during long work periods.
features: 2 Stage Clutch and E-CLUTCH for maximum control in bind-up situations - A Perform and Protect feature
Compatible with DWH050K drilling dust extraction system
Shocks - Active Vibration Control reduces vibration felt by the user at the handles. A Perform and Protect feature
additional_features: Compatible with DWH053K chiseling dust extraction system
15.5 joules of impact energy provides maximum performance in drilling and chipping
15 amp motor provides maximum overload protection and power
Electronic variable speed allows the user to control the speed of drilling and chipping while maintaining speed under load
Rear handle mount means less bending over when using tool in down drilling applications
Trigger lock on reduces user fatigue while chipping, only available in chipping mode
Electronic Soft Start provides the user more control when the trigger is pulled

rows.title: 2 in. SDS MAX Rotary Hammer

With a high-output, German-engineered mechanism, constant-speed electronics, and a brushless motor, this midweight hammer delivers 19.4 Joules of impact energy. Featuring the Anti-Rotation E-CLUTCH System and SHOCKS ACTIVE VIBRATION CONTROL, this hammer is built with safety in mind. Ideally suited for horizontal and downward drilling for #7 - #14 rebar applications, core drilling up to 6 in., and chipping in any mid-to-lower wall and floor applications, this tool is Tag Ready for seamless integration to the TOOL CONNECT inventory management system. features: In addition to the integral clutch, the DEWALT anti-rotation E-CLUTCH system, offers technology capable of detecting the motion of the tool. This feature senses the motion of the tool and shuts it down if necessary. The red indicator led illuminates when the E-CLUTCH System is engaged
Protects user from the effects of vibration, including numbness and tingling in the hands, allowing them to get work done more quickly without fatigue
Tool maintains speed under heavy loads, including in higher PSI concrete, allowing the user to get the job done faster
additional_features: Offers users more control by adjusting speed of drilling or chipping based upon the thickness and density of the material they are working with
Gives users the ability to drill and demolish concrete in one tool, saving them money by not needing to buy and maintain 2 tools
Service brush light near the handle notifies the user when it's time to take the tool in for service
includes: (1) D25773 2 in. SDS MAX Rotary Hammer
applications: End-users drill into concrete wall or floor slab to install #7 - # 14 rebar with adhesive anchors, to add concrete extensions to the wall or floor.

To install a mechanical anchor, a hole must be drilled first. Mechanical anchors are used to secure other materials to concrete. A typical anchors for this type of tool include our Atomic+ Undercut, large diameter Power-Stud+, large diameter Power-Bolt+ or large diameter Screw-Bolt+
Commercial electrical, mechanical and plumbing contractors will drill holes thru concrete walls with a coring bit to feed pipes and other utilities into other areas of the building.
Companies that do both drilling and demolition will use these combination hammers to chip away over-poured concrete once forms are taken off.
Commercial Demolition, Masonry and Concrete contractors will use this tool to demo concrete and masonry wall and floor structures.

rows.title: XTREME 12V MAX* Brushless Cordless 9/16 in. SDS PLUS Rotary Hammer (Tool Only)
rows.description: Tackle tough jobs with this high-performance XTREME 12V MAX* Brushless Cordless 9/16 in. SDS PLUS Rotary Hammer. Featuring a brushless motor and a durable German-engineered mechanism this COMPACT & PERFORMANCE PACKED tool delivers 1.1 Joules of impact energy. With a lightweight design, this Rotary Hammer is ideal for mounting strut, installing conduit, hanging fixtures, pipe clamp anchoring, and maintenance repair operations. Get OSHA Table 1 Compliance when using the DWH200D Dust Shroud and the DWH161D1 Dust Extractor. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Fast Drilling In Concrete - With 1.1 J of impact energy
Low-Burden Maneuverability - Compact design makes this tool great for installing conduit, mounting strut, maintenance repair applications, pipe clamp anchoring, and hanging fixtures
High-Efficiency Brushless Motor - With German-engineered mechanism for optimized performance and runtime
additional_features: OSHA Table 1 Compliant - When paired the DWH200D dust shroud and DWH161D1 dust extractor
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 12 volts. Nominal voltage is 10.8.

The lightweight design makes this tool ideal for forming, rod hanging, structural connections, beam and column anchorage, steel stanchion mounting, and clip and bracket mounting. Optimize performance in a wide range of jobs with a rotating dial that can be set to drill, hammer drill, or chip mode. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
